# Codewithsage

> Codewithsage builds modern websites, web apps, mobile apps, and AI-powered digital products for businesses.

Codewithsage is a digital development studio founded by Babalola Abdallah. We design and ship high-performing websites, ecommerce platforms, backend systems, and mobile applications with a focus on clarity, speed, and measurable business outcomes.

## Public pages

- [Home](https://www.codewithsage.com/): Overview of services, featured work, pricing, and testimonials.
- [About](https://www.codewithsage.com/about): Mission, approach, and founder information.
- [Portfolio](https://www.codewithsage.com/portfolio): Selected projects including ecommerce, mobile apps, and commerce platforms.
- [Get Started](https://www.codewithsage.com/get-started): How to begin a project with Codewithsage.
- [Contact](https://www.codewithsage.com/contact): Contact form and booking options.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.codewithsage.com/privacy-policy): Data collection and usage policy.

## Services

- Custom website and web app development
- Mobile app development (iOS and Android)
- E-commerce and commerce platform builds
- Payment integrations
- AI solutions and chatbot integration
- SEO-focused landing pages

## Contact

- Website: https://www.codewithsage.com
- Email: kvngbabstar@gmail.com

## Crawler policy

Public marketing pages are intended for indexing. Authentication and account pages should not be indexed.
